flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Delaware State University rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $10.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Delaware State University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (47.0% → 39.1%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Delaware State University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (32.9% → 28.2%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Delaware State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.3k → $20.6k).
